Products

Gyroscope Systems

Single to tri-axis fiber optic and MEMS gyroscopes from industrial to navigation-grade precision.

FOG GyroLKF-FS60

Single Axis Medium-High Precision FOG

Miniaturized closed-loop FOG with 135μm thin PM fiber technology. Compact, fast start-up, RS-422 output.

Size: 6×6×3 cm | RS-422 Digital Output
Electro-optical PodFlight ControlPlatform StabilizerLight UAV
Request Datasheet
FOG GyroLKF-FS50A/X

Single Axis Medium-Low Precision FOG

Compact closed-loop FOG with breakthrough miniaturized design. 135μm thin PM fiber technology reduces coil size. Pure solid-state, high reliability, ideal for medium-low precision inertial navigation and control applications.

Size: 5×5×3.65 cm | RS-422 Digital Output
Optical PlatformSatcom on the MoveIMULight UAV
Request Datasheet
FOG IMULKF-F3X90

Three-Axis High Precision FOG IMU

Navigation-grade tri-axis FOG inertial measurement unit for missile guidance and attitude control. Pure solid-state design, high engineering maturity, cost-effective. Full digital RS-422 output.

Size: 9×9×7.8 cm | RS-422 Output
Missile NavigationGuided BombsAttitude ControlNavigation Guidance
Request Datasheet
MEMS GyroLKF-MBG100A

Dual Axis MEMS Gyro Combination

High-bandwidth, low-latency, low-noise dual-axis MEMS gyro for servo stabilization. 100% localized components. In-situ replacement for flexure gyros. 4KHz sampling, -40°C to +80°C calibrated.

Size: 21.5×21.5×28 cm | 4KHz Sampling
Guide Head StabilizationOptoelectronic PodServo ControlStable Platforms
Request Datasheet
